strategy: Stop MCP and legacy HTTP command intake, drain in-flight commands, verify no pending decision blocks downgrade, apply migration 000003 down under the command barrier, then deploy the exact pre-Sprint-03 commit. Prefer forward repair after governed Sprint or decision data becomes operationally authoritative.

tests.name: code rollback target
tests.summary: The exact pre-Sprint-03 main commit passed its complete validation gate in an isolated worktree.

tests.name: governed migration rollback after feature use

runtime_state_impact: Migration 000003 owns Sprint, task, and decision state plus governed receipt constraints. Downgrade is supported only through its guarded down migration; reverting code while retaining an incompatible live schema is unsupported.
